Who I Am

Engineer by
education,
creator by choice.

First-year IT Engineering student with a strong interest in programming and web development. Skilled in C and HTML/CSS, I love building practical projects and exploring new technologies.

Beyond coding, I'm passionate about content creation, video editing, and thumbnail designing — skills that help me communicate ideas visually and creatively.
